problem: Checkout latency has regressed after the new recommendation pipeline was added.
stakeholders: Platform engineering, product, site reliability, finance
evidence: Datadog P99 increased from 420ms to 1.4s over 4 days; 22% of checkout attempts error-retry.
desired_outcome: Restore checkout median and P99 latencies below 900ms and reduce retries under 5% within one sprint.
constraints: Cannot alter payment gateway contract; cannot change public API in the next two sprints.
dependencies: Checkout service, recommendation API, Redis cache, feature flag service
existing_systems: Legacy Cart API, new Experiments service, SLO dashboard stack
hypotheses: N+1 queries in recommendation join; lock contention on stock cache; cold start overhead from sync jobs.
success_metrics: Median checkout 600ms, P99 <900ms, retry rate <5%, error budget remaining >80%.
tradeoffs: Quick cache-key fix may mask root cause; full refactor requires 3+ days and increases rollback risk.
risks: High retry volume may create retry storm during incident windows.
assumption_summary: Hypothesis that recommendation service fanout is the biggest latency driver is unverified.
frame_notes: Operational frame suggests throttling first; UX frame flags timeout messaging risk.
decision_rationale: Need one controlled experiment to compare cache-hit-only recommendation with full recommendation.

assumptions.evidence: 95th latency spikes align with recommendation cache misses.
assumptions.validation_next_step: Collect service-level traces filtered by cache-miss path.

assumptions.evidence: Release notes mention recommendation query complexity increase.
assumptions.validation_next_step: Run EXPLAIN plans for recommendation query under production replay.

frame_comparisons.framing: Optimize recommendation query plan and reduce fanout joins before UI changes.
frame_comparisons.evidence: Database wait time up in p99 timeline.
frame_comparisons.tradeoffs: Higher implementation effort; requires DBA review.
frame_comparisons.recommendation: recommended if latency budget is strict

frame_comparisons.framing: Roll out a temporary feature-flag-controlled degraded path with safe fallback.
frame_comparisons.evidence: Retry pressure indicates service instability under load.
frame_comparisons.tradeoffs: Customer experience tradeoffs for reduced personalization.

decision_log.rationale: Need comparative evidence before permanent change.
decision_log.rejected_alternatives: Immediate full rewrite rejected due to blast radius.

risk_dashboard.trigger: Cache miss rate exceeds 30% for 15 minutes
risk_dashboard.mitigation: Enable circuit-breaker fallback and warm cache aggressively.

risk_dashboard.trigger: Error budget burns 2% in one hour
risk_dashboard.mitigation: Auto-disable recommendations for top 10% traffic users temporarily.
